description: Seoul citydata POI 1-hour forecast validation against later citydata observations. No taxi-call labels used.

latest.note: POI forecast validation uses Seoul citydata population/congestion forecasts versus later Seoul citydata observations. It is not taxi-call accuracy scoring.
